description: EHRI (European Holocaust Research Infrastructure) provides an online portal for Holocaust-related archival metadata, institutions, descriptions, vocabularies, and related research data. Its portal exposes programmatic access to that data through multiple web APIs and dataset endpoints.
summary: EHRI exposes public data-access surfaces on portal.ehri-project.eu including a public GraphQL endpoint, an HTTP JSON:API-style API v1, a public OAI-PMH endpoint, and public dataset downloads; no CLI or MCP server was found.
